Inorganic Paints and Coatings

INORGANIC PAINT AND COATINGS

Paints and coatings with inorganic-poymer additions of titanium oxide, silica, quartz, pearlite, silisium carbide, boron carbide, zirkonium okxide, alumina, boron oxide, magnesium silicate, alüminium silicate, micro glass beads are applied for any surface for flame retarding purposes.
